prompt: Use case: TaraHome technical blog cover. Asset type: clean photorealistic editorial smart-home photograph. Create a warm, believable residential scene on a natural oak console in a calm modern living room: a homeowner's hands carefully checking one small unbranded Matter smart-home accessory beside a compact unbranded local smart-home hub and a normal unbranded Wi-Fi router. A phone may rest nearby with its screen dark and no visible interface. Natural morning window light, cream plaster wall, real wood and woven materials, restrained dark-green accent from a small cable or nearby plant, practical rather than luxurious. The composition should communicate verifying official local smart-home compatibility and troubleshooting without depicting logos, certificates, badges, seals, text, or an argument. Wide landscape cover, key hands and devices centered with generous surrounding room so the scene remains clear in both a 16:10 article crop and centered 16:9 card crop. Authentic product photography, realistic scale, ordinary cables and shadows, subtle depth of field, restrained Tara aesthetic. No embedded words, headline, title poster, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, certification mark, QR code, chart, graph, diagram, routing line, network path overlay, decorative line overlay, translucent panel, inset frame, floating UI card, progress bar, screen UI, fake product branding, invented branded hardware, duplicated objects, sci-fi glow, or generic AI-looking smart-home visualization.
